reasoning: Standard property of filter. Correct and expected.
Empty sequence filters to empty. Definitional base case.
Direct consequence of the lemma's first ensures clause: `s.push(e).filter(pred) == s.filter(pred).push(e)`, so len increases by 1.
Direct consequence of the lemma's second ensures clause: `s.push(e).filter(pred) == s.filter(pred)`, so len is unchanged.
